headline: Carvana Syracuse Expansion Tests Reconditioning Economics And Growth Story
summary: Carvana has expanded inspection and reconditioning operations at its ADESA Syracuse facility. The expansion is expected to create roughly 200 new jobs in the local area. The move increases capacity for faster vehicle turnaround and a wider inventory selection across Carvana's network. For investors tracking NYSE:CVNA, this operational update sits against a backdrop of a share price of $379.09 and a very large 3 year return of around 31x, along with a 46.5% return over the past year. headline: Carvana Brings Inspection and Reconditioning Center Capabilities to ADESA Chicago
summary: CHICAGO, May 06, 2026--Carvana (NYSE: CVNA), the industry pioneer for buying and selling cars online, today announced plans to bring Inspection and Reconditioning Center (IRC) capabilities to its existing ADESA Chicago wholesale auction site.
